captions.instagram:
Seattle, Washington tide predictions for the week ahead.

The highest astronomical tide in this seven-day window is predicted at 11.46 ft above local MLLW at 10:32 PM on July 20, 2026. The lowest is -0.69 ft, a predicted range of 12.15 ft at NOAA station 9447130.

Times are station-local. Predictions are not observations or a flood forecast.

Open the full station chart at the link in bio.

Save this chart for coastal planning around Seattle. Which Washington coast station should Perigee cover next?

NOAA CO-OPS • Planning aid — not for navigation or a substitute for official advisories, local procedures, or operator judgment.
